title: Weekly Vessel Valuations Report, June 21 2022
summary:
Main
in Weekly Vessel Valuations Report 21/06/2022
Image reference: 2022-06-21_weekly-vessel-valuations-report-june-21-2022_img1.png
Bulkers: Supramax values have softened
Capesize Baltimore (177,200 DWT, Mar 2005, Namura) sold to OceanPal for USD 22.00 mil, VV Value USD 19.30 mil - Internal. Supramax Bao Progress (56,700 DWT, Jan 2011, Jiangdong) sold to unknown Greek buyers for USD 17.60 mil, VV Value USD 17.33 mil - BWTS Fitted. Supramax Cardinal (55,400 DWT, Jul 2004, Oshima) sold to unknown Chinese buyers for USD 15.80 mil, VV Value USD 16.35 mil - DD Due.
